name: resume-builder
description: Evidence-backed, job-specific resume builder with a structured Career Vault.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @resume-builder/web" "npm run dev -w @resume-builder/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @resume-builder/contracts && npm run build -w @resume-builder/web && npm run build -w @resume-builder/api && npm run build -w @resume-builder/worker && npm run build -w @resume-builder/companion
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
